migrations.name: create_execution_foundation_store_v1
statements:
CREATE TABLE internal_execution_command_states (
    command_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (strategy_version > 0),
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    command_kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (command_kind IN ('OPEN', 'REVERSE')),
    desired_target_side TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (desired_target_side IN ('LONG', 'SHORT')),
    desired_target_quantity INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (desired_target_quantity > 0),
    state TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (state IN ('RECEIVED', 'ADMITTED', 'REJECTED')),
    requested_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (requested_qty > 0),
    filled_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (filled_qty >= 0),
    remaining_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (remaining_qty >= 0),
    received_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    received_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    terminal_at_ts INTEGER,
    terminal_at_utc TEXT,
    blocking_reason TEXT,
    fixture_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    fixture_payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    CHECK (filled_qty + remaining_qty = requested_qty)
)

CREATE INDEX internal_execution_command_states_time_idx
ON internal_execution_command_states (
    instrument_id,
    updated_at_ts
)

CREATE TABLE internal_execution_command_transitions (
    transition_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    command_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    sequence_no INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (sequence_no > 0),
    from_state TEXT,
    to_state TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (to_state IN ('RECEIVED', 'ADMITTED', 'REJECTED')),
    reason TEXT,
    occurred_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    occurred_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (command_id)
        REFERENCES internal_execution_command_states(command_id),
    UNIQUE (command_id, sequence_no)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_strategy_positions (
    account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    projection_status TEXT NOT NULL,
    side TEXT NOT NULL,
    quantity INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
    updated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (account_id, strategy_id, deployment_id, instrument_id)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_execution_readiness (
    account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('NOT_READY', 'READY', 'BLOCKED')),
    command_intake_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (command_intake_enabled IN (0, 1)),
    broker_actions_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (broker_actions_enabled IN (0, 1)),
    updated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (account_id, strategy_id, deployment_id, instrument_id)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_daily_risk_states (
    account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    trading_day TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('NOT_READY', 'MONITORING', 'TRIGGERED', 'CLOSING', 'HALTED')),
    pnl_ready INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (pnl_ready IN (0, 1)),
    cleanup_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (cleanup_status IN ('NOT_REQUIRED', 'PENDING', 'COMPLETE', 'FAILED')),
    updated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (account_id, strategy_id, deployment_id, trading_day)
)

CREATE VIEW public_execution_command_states_v1 AS
SELECT
    command_id,
    strategy_id,
    strategy_version,
    deployment_id,
    instrument_id,
    command_kind,
    desired_target_side,
    desired_target_quantity,
    state,
    requested_qty,
    filled_qty,
    remaining_qty,
    received_at_ts,
    received_at_utc,
    updated_at_ts,
    updated_at_utc,
    terminal_at_ts,
    terminal_at_utc,
    blocking_reason,
    payload_json
FROM internal_execution_command_states

CREATE VIEW public_strategy_positions_v1 AS
SELECT
    account_id,
    strategy_id,
    deployment_id,
    instrument_id,
    projection_status,
    side,
    quantity,
    updated_at_ts,
    updated_at_utc,
    payload_json
FROM internal_strategy_positions

CREATE VIEW public_execution_readiness_v1 AS
SELECT
    account_id,
    strategy_id,
    deployment_id,
    instrument_id,
    status,
    command_intake_enabled,
    broker_actions_enabled,
    updated_at_ts,
    updated_at_utc,
    payload_json
FROM internal_execution_readiness

CREATE VIEW public_daily_risk_states_v1 AS
SELECT
    account_id,
    strategy_id,
    deployment_id,
    trading_day,
    status,
    pnl_ready,
    cleanup_status,
    updated_at_ts,
    updated_at_utc,
    payload_json
FROM internal_daily_risk_states

migrations.name: create_broker_attempt_reconciliation_store_v1
statements:
CREATE TABLE internal_broker_order_operations (
    operation_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    command_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (strategy_version > 0),
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    side TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (side IN ('BUY', 'SELL')),
    order_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (order_type = 'MARKET'),
    con_id INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (con_id > 0),
    local_symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    requested_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (requested_qty > 0),
    filled_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (filled_qty >= 0),
    remaining_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (remaining_qty >= 0),
    state TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (state IN ('PREPARING', 'SUBMITTING', 'LIVE', 'RECONCILING', 'SUCCEEDED', 'FAILED_RETRYABLE', 'FAILED_OPERATOR_REQUIRED', 'UNKNOWN_OUTCOME')),
    current_attempt_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    current_attempt_no INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (current_attempt_no > 0),
    created_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    terminal_at_ts INTEGER,
    terminal_at_utc TEXT,
    blocking_reason TEXT,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    CHECK (filled_qty + remaining_qty = requested_qty)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_broker_order_attempts (
    attempt_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    operation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    attempt_no INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (attempt_no > 0),
    order_ref TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    side TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (side IN ('BUY', 'SELL')),
    order_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (order_type = 'MARKET'),
    con_id INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (con_id > 0),
    local_symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    requested_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (requested_qty > 0),
    filled_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (filled_qty >= 0),
    remaining_qty INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (remaining_qty >= 0),
    state TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (state IN ('PREPARING', 'SUBMITTING', 'LIVE', 'FILLED', 'CANCELLED', 'REJECTED', 'FAILED', 'UNKNOWN_OUTCOME')),
    broker_order_id INTEGER,
    broker_perm_id INTEGER,
    broker_status TEXT,
    broker_terminal_proven INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (broker_terminal_proven IN (0, 1)),
    created_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    terminal_at_ts INTEGER,
    terminal_at_utc TEXT,
    last_broker_proof_at_ts INTEGER,
    last_broker_proof_at_utc TEXT,
    failure_reason TEXT,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (operation_id)
        REFERENCES internal_broker_order_operations(operation_id),
    UNIQUE (operation_id, attempt_no),
    CHECK (filled_qty + remaining_qty = requested_qty)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_broker_operation_transitions (
    transition_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    operation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    sequence_no INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (sequence_no > 0),
    from_state TEXT,
    to_state TEXT NOT NULL,
    reason TEXT,
    occurred_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    occurred_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (operation_id)
        REFERENCES internal_broker_order_operations(operation_id),
    UNIQUE (operation_id, sequence_no)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_broker_attempt_transitions (
    transition_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    attempt_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    sequence_no INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (sequence_no > 0),
    from_state TEXT,
    to_state TEXT NOT NULL,
    reason TEXT,
    occurred_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    occurred_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (attempt_id)
        REFERENCES internal_broker_order_attempts(attempt_id),
    UNIQUE (attempt_id, sequence_no)
)

CREATE TABLE internal_broker_reconciliation_observations (
    observation_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    operation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    attempt_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    sequence_no INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (sequence_no > 0),
    outcome TEXT NOT NULL,
    observed_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (operation_id)
        REFERENCES internal_broker_order_operations(operation_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (attempt_id)
        REFERENCES internal_broker_order_attempts(attempt_id),
    UNIQUE (attempt_id, sequence_no)
)

CREATE VIEW public_broker_order_operations_v1 AS
SELECT
    operation_id,
    command_id,
    account_id,
    strategy_id,
    strategy_version,
    deployment_id,
    instrument_id,
    side,
    order_type,
    con_id,
    local_symbol,
    requested_qty,
    filled_qty,
    remaining_qty,
    state,
    current_attempt_id,
    current_attempt_no,
    created_at_ts,
    created_at_utc,
    updated_at_ts,
    updated_at_utc,
    terminal_at_ts,
    terminal_at_utc,
    blocking_reason,
    payload_json
FROM internal_broker_order_operations

CREATE VIEW public_broker_order_attempts_v1 AS
SELECT
    attempt_id,
    operation_id,
    attempt_no,
    order_ref,
    side,
    order_type,
    con_id,
    local_symbol,
    requested_qty,
    filled_qty,
    remaining_qty,
    state,
    broker_order_id,
    broker_perm_id,
    broker_status,
    broker_terminal_proven,
    created_at_ts,
    created_at_utc,
    updated_at_ts,
    updated_at_utc,
    terminal_at_ts,
    terminal_at_utc,
    last_broker_proof_at_ts,
    last_broker_proof_at_utc,
    failure_reason,
    payload_json
FROM internal_broker_order_attempts
